subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Holley, spoken on 1913-05-04
subcodes.first_line: For healing, prayer and medicine both are necessary. God has created the herbs and the plants with their useful properties.... We have been talking about healing
subcodes.first_line_orig: شفا دو قسم است جسمانی و روحانی خدا دوا را بی سبب خلق نکرده... چون در اجزآء بدن مانند جزء شکری یا نشوی
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power of prayer
